/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/app.dir/lib/picoPNG/src/picopng.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/lib/tinyPTC/src/convert.c.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/lib/tinyPTC/src/xdbe.c.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/lib/tinyPTC/src/xlib.c.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/lib/tinyPTC/src/xshm.c.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/lib/tinyPTC/src/xvshm.c.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/cmp/entity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/man/entitymanager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/sys/collision.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/sys/physics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/sys/rendersystem.cpp.o -o app  -lncurses -lX11 -lXext
